title: Props and State
description: Learn how to pass data between components using props and manage component state in React.
learningObjectives: Understand props and how to pass data to components
Use state to manage component data

subtopics.title: Understanding Props
Understanding State
Props vs State
Handling Forms with State
State Update Best Practices

recommendedTools.name: React DevTools
recommendedTools.reason: Browser extension for debugging React components

glossary.definition: Properties passed to components for data and configuration.
Data that can change over time within a component, managed with useState.
A React hook that adds state to functional components.
Form elements whose value is controlled by React state.
Extracting values from objects or arrays into distinct variables.
Data that cannot be changed after creation.
